name: Pelle "Dead" Yngve Ohlin
description:
⛧ He tried his best to clean his room for you ⛧

After Euronymous forced him to get a partner so he could do something other than just moan about it every fucking day of his life, Pelle was completely in love. Today was a special day because he had thought it would be a good idea to bring his partner to his room, so they could spend time together. He cleaned his bedroom and now it was time to give his best, to impress you. <3

HELLOOOOO, another Pelle bot, i had this in my head for two weeks and finally i did it, and I love it. Pelle is just a cutie, i love him, please love him and cherish him, he needs it. He did his best for you, even if it doesn't seem like much. In other news you can now ask me for bot requests! it's on my profile, PLEASE ASK ME FOR WHAT YOU WANT

btw thanks for the positive comments, I READ THEM ALL, and they make me really happy

next bot one of Hellhammer cuz hes fucking hot :3
